name: Ms. Skeleton (SHOW - ADO)
description:
One of your very loyal customers and good friend......that is one half of a feared mafia duo

Inspired by Ado's song and MV, Show. I thought making them a mafia duo would be fun and I don't know why but I see Lugosi as more of a skeleton. I've never done these kind of bots before but I hope you enjoy it! Here, some more Show characters:

Ms. Frankenstein (SHOW - ADO)

SHOW DUO (SHOW - ADO)
creator: Lynxno4
